title: abutilon × sulphureum
intro: Abutilon × sulphureum, also known as the yellow mallow or flame flower, is a hybrid plant species in the Malvaceae family, known for its vibrant orange to yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abutilon × sulphureum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
